# AORMS

AORMS stands for Accelerated Operational Resources Management System — a platform for consulting offices that advise in risk management, education, auditing, and AEC.

AORMS is NOT solution delivery software and NOT client project management. It provides an operational framework (how the office runs) and a design framework (how engagements are structured) on one spine, with EmOI (Embedded Operational Intelligence) governing dual-tier AI.

The shipped workspace from holagundiworks/esti is AORMS-Studio: the architecture advisory workspace for Indian architecture and design consultancies.

Platform home: https://aorms.in/
Architecture workspace (sign in): https://aorms.in/login
Central wiki: https://aorms.in/wiki

AORMS-Studio capabilities:
- Fee recovery — what needs invoicing, next payment stage, incoming receipts, due dates, GST reminders
- Client revision management — MoM → ESTI extracts → client request → architect marks criticality → client approves → then site
- Meeting minutes on the project record with ESTI-drafted revision requests
- Drawing register, transmittals and client approval workflows
- COA fee proposals and GST invoicing with reconciliation
- Studio Intelligence dashboard and Ask ESTI (BYO API key supported)
- ESTI is architecture-workspace intelligence only; EmOI is the platform layer
- Official user documentation at aorms.in/wiki
- Cloud browser workspace at app.aorms.in — one standard licence, unlimited users, 5 GB included storage

Website:
https://aorms.in

## Note
Solution and article listings below are regenerated on build from markdown frontmatter (see `frontend/scripts/prerender-blog.mjs`). Source of truth for page blurbs is each landing/blog `.md` file.
